name: chi_holographic_susceptibility
app_r_label: Critical susceptibility χ = π(c/H_0 ℓ_P)² (holographic de Sitter entropy)
tier: Tier 2 (de Sitter Bekenstein-Hawking entropy; no fitted Friedmann-expression parameter after observational cosmology anchors are supplied)

extra.derivation_note: Standard de Sitter horizon area = 4π R_H² with R_H = c/H_0. Bekenstein-Hawking entropy = area / (4 ℓ_P²) = π(R_H/ℓ_P)² = π(c/(H_0 ℓ_P))². No GCT-specific input — this is the standard holographic identity. Manuscript identifies the Tier 2 substance not in the formula (which is standard Bekenstein-Hawking) but in the IDENTIFICATION of this horizon entropy with the critical susceptibility of the 6D → 3D projection — that identification is the load-bearing Tier 2 claim, while the numerical value follows from CODATA + Planck-2018 H_0.
